result.devtools_observation: DevTools Network tab shows generation/graphql/render-generation requests all returning 200/201/202. No Etap interception detected. Gamma AI successfully generated 10 cards about the test keyword. Requests to gamma.app went through without blocking.

notes: Gamma AI generation was NOT blocked. block_mode=1 did not intercept ai.api.gamma.app requests. All API calls returned successful status codes (200/201/202). Content about 한글날 was fully generated with 10 cards.
